introSection: Roadrunner Express is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Six Flags Discovery Kingdom in Vallejo, California, USA. The ride was manufactured by Zamperla and is themed to the Road Runner and Wile E. Coyote characters. It debuted at the park in the 1999 season.
fullText:
Roadrunner Express is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Six Flags Discovery Kingdom in Vallejo, California, USA. The ride was manufactured by Zamperla and is themed to the Road Runner and Wile E. Coyote characters. It debuted at the park in the 1999 season.



Blue track and supports.
